steps.title: Substitute x = 46 into the equation
steps.content:
The equation $y = 0.58x + 3.4$ predicts larvae count for a given number of worker ants. With $x = 46$ worker ants, substitute directly:
$$y = 0.58(46) + 3.4$$

steps.title: Evaluate and identify the closest choice
steps.content:
Multiply first: $0.58 \times 46 = 26.68$. Then add the constant:
$$y = 26.68 + 3.4 = 30.08$$
Among the choices $30$, $49$, $73$, and $142$, the value $30.08$ is closest to $30$. That matches the correct answer, so A is correct.
